# Basketball Video Analyzer

> Free, open-source basketball video analysis tool built by a coach, for coaches.

Basketball Video Analyzer is a desktop application for cutting, organizing, and exporting basketball game footage. It runs on Windows, macOS, and Linux.

## Key Features

- **Video Cutting**: Mark in/out points with keyboard shortcuts (I, O, Space, arrow keys for frame-by-frame)
- **Hierarchical Categories**: Create category trees for offense, defense, transitions, or any coaching system
- **Clip Library**: Browse and filter all marked clips with visual thumbnails
- **Batch Export**: Export clips organized into category-based folders with one click
- **Project Organization**: Organize footage by game, opponent, or practice session

## Links

- Website: https://basketballvideoanalyzer.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/kauredo/basketball-video-analyzer
- Download: https://github.com/kauredo/basketball-video-analyzer/releases
- Issues: https://github.com/kauredo/basketball-video-analyzer/issues

## Technical Details

- Built with Electron and web technologies
- Cross-platform: Windows, macOS, Linux
- Free and open source (MIT license)
- No subscriptions, no data collection
- Created by kauredo (https://github.com/kauredo)
